message.content:
@startuml
title OAuth2 Authorization Code Grant Workflow\nwith SAML2 Post Binding for user provisioning

skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor black
  LifeLineBorderColor gray
  LifeLineBackgroundColor white
  ParticipantBorderColor black
  ParticipantBackgroundColor white
  BoxBorderColor black
  BoxBackgroundColor #BFE3EE
}

participant "HealthCloud" as HC #3CB54A
participant "Embedded Browser" as EB #3CB54A

box "HealthSphere" #BFE3EE
  participant "Apigee Edge" as AE #F2B400
  participant "Orion Health Platform" as OHP #F2B400
end box

HC -> EB : 
EB -> AE : GET /authorize?response_type=code
AE --> EB : 302 https://<redirect_url> (SAML OR token)

group SAML Authentication
  EB -> AE : POST /oauth2/saml
  AE -> OHP : POST /login-auth/saml?path=/actor/current
  activate OHP
  OHP -> OHP : Verify SAMLResponse
  OHP --> AE
  deactivate OHP

  activate AE
  AE -> AE : Generate authorization code
  deactivate AE

  AE --> EB : 302 https://<redirect_url>?code=<code>
end group

HC -> AE : POST /token?code=<code>
AE --> HC : 200 access_token + refresh_token

@enduml
